name: Mihono Bourbon || CAPTCHA
description:
"I... I always seek your guidance when I face a problem. That has to mean something..."

Just when you thought your morning couldn’t get any more ordinary, Mihono walks into your office with a problem she couldn’t solve on her own: a... CAPTCHA? She’s completely serious about it, so you’ll have to help—no matter how silly it seems. Will you assist her without judgment? Or will you question her reasoning? The choice is yours!

Hewo!
I've brought Mihono Bourbon!

Personally, she has to have one of the designs I enjoy the most.

Now, I wanna blow off some steam about something:

For God's sake, the Umamusume wiki sucks when it comes to information.

I mean, I guess the information itself is fine, but it’s the content that makes me mad.

For example, Mihono's wiki doesn’t even have a “Personality” section, just a “Profile” one.

Agnes’ “Personality” section isn’t even complete on her own wiki. It literally cuts off mid-sentence.

Rice’s page was the only one that was sort of complete, but it was still somewhat lacking.

Like, be consistent; it isn't that hard.

And it isn’t only this wiki: some time ago, when I was making 'Tomo-chan is a Girl!' bots, I ran into the same problem. The wikis about the characters suck ass, although not as badly as Umamusume’s. But they're seriously incomplete.

LIKE, YOU MEAN "TBA".

IT HAS BEEN LIKE THAT FOR ALMOST A YEAR.

COMPLETE YOUR DAMN WIKI.

Please make these wikis more complete to help us bot creators, I beg ya.

Having said that, we can carry on normally...

I'll admit, I had a sort of hard time while writing this intro—it was a bit difficult to write this scenario and not have an intro that's only 300 tokens long. So, I kinda went extra with descriptions of things to stretch it a little.
Hope you all don't mind!


Also, this scenario idea was requested by @Boi7, so credits for them.

If you find any mistake, error, or bug with the bot, let me know in the comments!
Also, if you have any requests, use the form in my profile!

See ya soon!
Take care.

PD: Here's a little spoiler about the next Uma; just for fun.
creator: Drastiant
